mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gb_site_generation_relations ( site_id, generation_id, relation_type, create_by, create_time ) VALUES ( #{siteId}, #{relatedId}, #{relationType}, #{createBy}, #{createTime} )

INSERT INTO gb_site_generation_relations ( site_id, generation_id, relation_type, create_by, create_time ) VALUES
( #{item.siteId}, #{item.relatedId}, #{item.relationType}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime} )
